proofClass: analytic proof with finite Schur certificate input

finiteAugmentedSchurRepairStatus.label: finite augmented Schur repair
finiteAugmentedSchurRepairStatus.reason: The finite R_aug=(Lambda,Mu) Schur certificate reports D_aug,N>=0, K_N+R_aug,N^*D_aug,N R_aug,N>=0, and Mu annihilates ker R_aug,N in the tested finite quotient model.

continuumTransportedRepairStatus.label: continuum transported repair
continuumTransportedRepairStatus.reason: Trace convergence transports the finite augmented repair to X_aug=closure Ran(R_aug).  KLM positivity controls the Volterra tail, and the Green-lift graph closure makes the quotient Schur form a bounded nonnegative operator D_aug on X_aug.

closedAugmentedPositiveFormStatus.label: closed augmented positive form
closedAugmentedPositiveFormStatus.reason: The form K+R_aug^*D_aug R_aug is continuous in the augmented graph norm and nonnegative on the dense core, hence extends as a closed nonnegative form.

proof: Use the finite Schur certificate to identify the positive augmented repair block.
Use R_aug,N -> R_aug in the transported trace topology.
Use all-omega KLM/Weyl positivity for the diagonal Volterra tail.
Use Green-lift closure to pass the quotient Schur form to the completed domain.
